hobby.name: Woodworking
hobby.description: Practiced woodworking for 12 years with a focus on functional, family-driven projects that improved the home. Built everything from large entertainment cabinets to custom furniture using a full shop setup including table saw, miter saw, router, circular saw, dust collector, and a series of custom hand-built jigs. Projects were designed, planned, and executed independently — built to last, not just to look good.

highlights.item: Built a massive corner entertainment cabinet housing a 45" TV, DVD/VHS storage, and full cable management — designed and executed from scratch
Constructed a 12-foot window seat with hinged storage lids for toys, games, and linens
Built open pantry wall cabinetry and shelving for the kitchen
Designed and built student desks fitted below bedroom windows for the kids
Full shop setup with power tools and custom hand jigs; practiced across 12 years of continuous home and family projects

project.name: Corner Entertainment Cabinet
project.description: Massive corner unit housing a 45" TV, DVD and VHS storage, with full cable management and concealment

project.name: 12-Foot Window Seat
project.description: Full-length window seat with hinged opening lids for storing toys, games, pillows, and comfort items

project.name: Open Pantry Wall Cabinetry
project.description: Custom wall cabinets and shelving installed as an open pantry in the kitchen

project.name: Boys Bedroom Student Desks
project.description: Built-in student desks fitted below bedroom windows for the kids
